response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including AI infrastructure and cloud platforms. They have worked with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Proven track record of leading technical projects and mentoring teams
Strong background in software development with various technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in GenAI or RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with vector databases or multi-agent system frameworks
Limited cloud platform experience mentioned, mainly AWS
